query: amateur snapshot with crooked tilted horizon, accidentally rotated photo, off-kilter handheld shot
message: composition_and_structure / unconventional_framing — anti_aesthetic. Off-kilter, dutch-angle, accidentally rotated handheld snapshots with informal vernacular framing. Includes parties, sports wipeouts, fallen signs, casual portraiture, awkward angles.

response.objective_caption: A close-up of a Cruzan Pineapple Rum bottle displaying its green and white label with metallic gold block letters spelling "CRUZAN" and black stylized script reading "Pineapple Rum." Smaller text below indicates it is a premium Caribbean rum with natural pineapple flavor, and a small pineapple graphic appears near the bottom of the label. Behind the bottle, a stemmed glass containing a red beverage with a dark round garnish sits on a surface.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A close-up of a Cruzan Pineapple Rum bottle with a green label bearing gold and black lettering and a pineapple graphic, captured with heavy intentional blur from extremely shallow depth of field. The background, which includes a stemmed glass holding a red beverage and a dark garnish, dissolves into soft, abstract, out-of-focus shapes, isolating the bottle while lending the scene a casual, intimate atmosphere.
